hero.title: Authentic Spanish flavors on the move
hero.subtitle: Freshly made products inspired by Spanish tradition, present at fairs, markets and festivals across different cities in Switzerland.

classic.title: Traditional churro
classic.desc: Classic recipe, freshly made and crispy.

filled.title: Hot chocolate
filled.desc: The traditional accompaniment, intense and creamy.

signature.title: Coffee
signature.desc: A simple option to complement every moment.

specials.title: Special options
specials.desc: Sugar, cinnamon and different presentations depending on the event.

story.title: Our Story
story.paragraph:
We are a group of friends who share the same idea: bringing traditional Spanish flavors to different corners of Switzerland.

Through a simple and approachable format, we offer products inspired by a tradition deeply rooted in our culture.

Our goal is to share an authentic experience at fairs, markets and festivals.

events.title: Events
events.paragraphOne: We move across different cities in Switzerland, taking part in fairs, markets and festivals throughout the year.
events.paragraphTwo: Each stop is a new opportunity to continue sharing our proposal and bring Spanish flavor to new places.
events.upcoming: You can find us soon in
